# stack Provider

Read Nuon install-stack configuration and report run status from Terraform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    stack = {
      source = "nuonco/stack"
    }
  }
}

provider "stack" {
  # Base URL of the Nuon API. Defaults to https://api.nuon.co; override for
  # stage or BYOC control planes.
  # api_url = "https://api.nuon.co"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_url` (String) Base URL of the Nuon API, up to but excluding `/v1`. Defaults to `https://api.nuon.co`.
